name: Rapalogs
summary: Interventions that modulate mTOR signaling as a route to aging-relevant benefit.
approach_summary: This track groups rapamycin-like interventions intended to improve aging-relevant biology through nutrient-sensing pathways.
mechanism_summary: Primary emphasis is mTOR modulation with downstream effects on autophagy and stress-response pathways.
inclusion_criteria: Aging relevance is part of the study rationale or interpretation.
